structure: inline rules on homepage at #rules anchor

collections.title: Rules (inline on homepage)
collections.notes: Rules section embedded in homepage. data/scans/mentfunding.json pageText covers 8/16 critical keywords (daily loss, max loss, drawdown, news, weekend, EA, hedging, SL) — sufficient for DBP_02 baseline normalization.

alternative_sources.note: Active community Discord referenced on homepage

alternative_sources.name: Mentbot
alternative_sources.note: FAQ chatbot — could potentially be queried for missing rule details

notes: No dedicated help center. Rules are inline at /#rules. scan pageText is the primary source. If detail insufficient, navigate to homepage and use browser_evaluate to capture #rules section innerText specifically.
